title: CJP protest in Delhi LIVE: Protestors chant ‘Dharmendra Pradhan must resign’ as Abhijeet Dipke leads demonstration
description: Cockroach Janta Party CJP protest in Delhi LIVE: Abhijeet Dipke, the founder of Gen Z-led Cockroach Janta Party, launched the protest after arriving at Jantar Mantar in Delhi. Several protesters gathered to raise slogans like “Dharmendra Pradhan, resign!”.
